betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Heat Exchanging Heater§f cools reactor coolants while generating §bTU (Thermal Units)§f.

§eFunction:§f
• Extracts heat from reactor coolant loops
• Converts heat to TU for further use

§eUsage:§f
Place a §bBoiler§f on top to heat fluids:
• §bWater§f → §bSteam§f
• Steam feeds turbines for power

§eTip:§f Essential for converting reactor heat to usable power.
